nodes.label: Listing Status Workflow (Nuevo/Revisado/Contactado/Rentado/Descartado)
nodes.rationale: User-managed tracking state that must never be overwritten by re-scraping. Statuses map between Spanish UI labels and English API values to keep UI localized and API consistent.

nodes.label: Bot Detection / Anti-Scraping Block Event
nodes.rationale: MercadoLibre detected scraper traffic and served the suspicious-traffic-frontend page requiring user login. Logged as an error artifact at 2026-06-16 20:32:01. The page shows /security/suspicious_traffic path and a CAPTCHA-free but login-gate anti-bot wall.

nodes.label: Upsert Non-Destructive Pattern for User Fields
nodes.rationale: setState only PATCHes user-managed fields (status, starred, notes) individually — never bulk-replaces a listing record. This ensures re-scraping never overwrites user annotations.
nodes.norm_label: upsert non-destructive pattern for user fields
